description: tool-call observability smoke: agent shell calls are recorded as action events

assertions.name: calledTool(shell)
assertions.evidence:
bash [completed]
  input: {"background":false,"cmd":"printf '%s
' 'niceeval-tool-call-ok' > TOOL_CALL_SMOKE.txt","cwd":"/home/user/workspace","timeout_seconds":30}
  output: "(no output)"
bash [completed]
  input: {"background":false,"cmd":"cd /home/user/workspace && npm run build","cwd":"/home/user/workspace","timeout_seconds":120}
  output: {"kind":"tool","message":"Tool 'bash' execution failed.","details":{"error":"RuntimeError('command exited with code 1\noutput:\nnpm error Missing script: "build"\nnpm error\nnpm error To see a list of scripts, run:\nnpm error   npm run\nnpm error A complete log of this run can be found in: /home/user/.npm/_logs/2026-07-13T08_09_44_424Z-debug-0.log')"}}
bash [completed]
  input: {"background":false,"cmd":"cd /home/user/workspace && cat package.json","cwd":"/home/user/workspace","timeout_seconds":30}
  output: "{
  "private": true
}"
bash [completed]
  input: {"background":false,"cmd":"cd /home/user/workspace && ls -la && find . -maxdepth 2 -type f | sed 's#^./##' | sort | head -200","cwd":"/home/user/workspace","timeout_seconds":30}
  output: "total 14
drwxr-xr-x 3 user user  128 Jul 13 08:09 .
drwx------ 8 user user 4096 Jul 13 08:09 ..
drwxr-xr-x 8 user user 4096 Jul 13 08:09 .git
-rw-r--r-- 1 user user   70 Jul 13 08:06 .gitignore
-rw-r--r-- 1 user user  460 Jul 13 08:09 AGENTS.md
-rw-r--r-- 1 user user  111 Jul 13 08:09 README.md
-rw-r--r-- 1 user user   22 Jul 13 08:09 TOOL_CALL_SMOKE.txt
-rw-r--r-- 1 user user   22 Jul 13 08:09 package.json
.git/COMMIT_EDITMSG
.git/HEAD
.git/config
.git/description
.git/index
.gitignore
AGENTS.md
README.md
TOOL_CALL_SMOKE.txt
package.json"
bash [completed]
  input: {"background":false,"cmd":"cd /home/user/workspace && cat TOOL_CALL_SMOKE.txt | sed -n '1p' && wc -l TOOL_CALL_SMOKE.txt","cwd":"/home/user/workspace","timeout_seconds":30}
  output: "niceeval-tool-call-ok
1 TOOL_CALL_SMOKE.txt"
assertions.group: Agent shell tool call is observable

assertions.name: eventsSatisfy(emitted a canonical shell action.called event)
assertions.group: Agent shell tool call is observable
